raw_comment:
I notice that in all the major sport leagues the maximum percentage of coaches of color does not exceed 41% I also notice that the NBA and WNBA have the highest percentage of colored players and the . The highest  percentage of colored head coaches can be found in the MLS and the lowest in the NFL. I notice that the MLB has the lowest diversity while the NBA has the highest diversity.

I wonder why the MLB has the lowest diversity. I also wonder why among all the major sports leagues the percentange of colored players is always greater than the percentage of colored coaches.

This graph might help me determine which major sports league people of color are more likely to get into. It can influence which sports young aspiring athletes direct their attention to. It also shows how the sports league prefer leadership positions to be filled by people of non-color.

Racial Inequality In Major Sports League.
ace_sentences: In all the major sport leagues, the maximum percentage of coaches of color does not exceed 41%.
The NBA has the highest percentage of colored players.
The WNBA has the highest percentage of colored players.
The highest percentage of colored head coaches can be found in the MLS.
The lowest percentage of colored head coaches can be found in the NFL.
The MLB has the lowest diversity.
The NBA has the highest diversity.
I wonder why the MLB has the lowest diversity.
I wonder why among all the major sports leagues the percentange of colored players is always greater than the percentage of colored coaches.
This graph might help me determine which major sports league people of color are more likely to get into.
This graph can influence which sports young aspiring athletes direct their attention to.
This graph shows that the sports league prefer leadership positions to be filled by people of non-color.
The title is "Racial Inequality In Major Sports League".
